text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: "I'm drownin' in homework! Ya gotta help me!" Sigh... Oh Taiki, always playing catch-up with your homework.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: "You have to learn how to manage on your own."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
"I'll make you some tea to help you through it, so
give it a try on your own first." There.
